meta.title: Professional verification
meta.description: Request verification as a psychologist, sexologist or doctor. Once approved, your badge appears in the community.

intro.title: Get verified as a professional
intro.subtitle: If you're a psychologist, sexologist or doctor, you can request verification. Once approved, your badge appears in the community and your replies get professional treatment.
intro.req_documents: Documents: degree, license and ID (PDF, JPG or PNG, 5 MB max each)
intro.req_bio: A short bio shown next to your badge

form.step1_title: What kind of professional are you?
form.step1_subtitle: We accept three credential types for now.
form.step2_subtitle: These details aren't shown publicly — the team uses them to validate your request.
form.full_name_help: Exactly as it appears on your degree or license.
form.step3_subtitle: This information IS shown alongside your verified badge.
form.bio_placeholder: A line or two about how you work and who you support.
form.bio_help: 500 characters max. Shown on hover and on your public card.
form.step4_title: How would you like to appear publicly?
form.step4_subtitle: We default to your legal name. If you prefer another professional name, set it here.
form.step5_subtitle: We need at least one document that proves your credential. Ideally: degree, professional license and ID.
form.upload_drop: Drop here or click to select
form.upload_constraints: PDF, JPG or PNG · 5 MB max per file · 8 files max
form.step6_subtitle: Check that everything is correct before submitting.
form.validation_country: Two-letter ISO code (e.g. CO, ES, MX).
form.submit_error: We couldn't submit your request. Try again in a few minutes.

status.pending_body: We're reviewing your documentation. We'll email you as soon as there's a decision. Meanwhile, your replies in the community don't carry the professional badge yet.
status.approved_title: You're a verified professional on Flavia
status.approved_body: Your verified-professional badge now appears next to your name in the community. Your replies have a distinct visual treatment.
status.rejected_body: We reviewed your documentation but something is missing or needs correction. Read the team's note and resubmit when you can.
status.revoked_body: Your verification was revoked by the team. If you think this is a mistake, get in touch.
status.no_request_body: When you start, your request will show up here.

success.title: Done! We received your request
success.body: The team reviews each request manually. We'll email you as soon as there's a decision. Meanwhile you can check the status any time.

admin.page_subtitle: Review and approve or reject professional requests.
admin.reject_reason_help: Explain clearly what's missing or what to fix. Minimum 4 characters.
